candidate.name: Madeline M. Dovi
candidate.title: Communications & Marketing Coordinator · Writer · Editor
candidate.tagline: Seek, speak and write the truth.
candidate.location: Buffalo, NY (open to NYC metro + Remote)

jobs.title: Digital Engagement Manager
jobs.description_snippet: Mission-driven food-access nonprofit hiring a Digital Engagement Manager to grow social channels, build content calendars, draft and publish high-performing posts, support email communications, and apply analytics/SEO to optimize performance.
jobs.cover_letter_opener: When I read that Field & Fork is looking for a Digital Engagement Manager to grow a mission-driven food-access movement, I recognized the shape of the work — it's the same craft I've been refining at the University at Buffalo's Research, Innovation and Economic Development office, where I grew our LinkedIn audience by more than 2,200 followers in three years and built a Research Matters newsletter that doubles the national higher-ed click-to-open benchmark. I'd love to bring that same momentum to a Buffalo nonprofit feeding our neighbors.

jobs.title: Social and Media Relations Manager
jobs.description_snippet: Boutique PR firm specializing in Tribal Diplomacy™ — lead media relations, draft press releases, pitch journalists, manage social calendars, write newsletters and blogs, run paid social campaigns. Uses Meltwater and Basecamp.
jobs.cover_letter_opener: Trysail's Tribal Diplomacy™ practice caught my eye because it sits exactly where my two careers meet — the newsroom and the comms shop. As a former Junior Editor at The Daily Caller News Foundation, I rose from reporter to editor in a year by turning pitches fast and writing clean AP-style headlines; today at UB I write the press releases, pitch the journalists, and run the editorial calendars on the other side of that same conversation. I'd love to bring both lenses to your media-relations table.

jobs.title: Marketing & Communications Specialist
jobs.description_snippet: On-site communications lead for GIBE's new Buffalo Campus Center. Tell stories about renovation progress, partnerships and community engagement; collaborate with Rochester-based marketing team. AP Style explicit.
jobs.cover_letter_opener: Golisano is opening a Buffalo campus center, and you need someone who can tell that story from the inside — partnerships, renovations, community moments, all in AP style. That is, in plain terms, the job I do every week at UB's Research, Innovation and Economic Development office, where I've covered everything from a $20 million federal AI institute to a Merck spin-out acquisition. I'd be thrilled to do that work for another Western New York institution Paul Golisano is helping put on the map.

jobs.title: Video Content Producer
jobs.description_snippet: Ragan Communications (publisher of PR Daily) is hiring a video content producer for its PR industry media brand.
match_reasons: Ragan literally certified Maddie last summer
Final Cut Pro + Audacity on resume
jobs.cover_letter_opener: Ragan certified me as a PR practitioner last summer — and now you're hiring a Video Content Producer at the same shop where I learned the standards I use every day. With Final Cut Pro and Audacity already in my podcast and reporting workflows, and a Ragan-trained eye for PR storytelling, I'd be thrilled to make this a full circle.

jobs.title: Content Marketing Manager
jobs.description_snippet: Develop and refine content across newsletters, social, whitepapers and other formats. Track performance of key channels (newsletter and social).
jobs.cover_letter_opener: Private Health Management's Content Marketing Manager role is, line-for-line, a more national version of what I do for the University at Buffalo today — newsletters that beat industry click rates, whitepapers translated from researcher to reader, and a social feed that earns the open. I'd love to bring that playbook to a remote healthcare team.

jobs.title: Senior Content Writer
jobs.description_snippet: Healthcare/emergency-services tech company hiring a senior content writer to lead blog, white papers, press releases, email campaigns and social. Salesforce + CMS shop.
jobs.cover_letter_opener: ImageTrend's content stack — Salesforce, CMS publishing, multi-format storytelling for healthcare and emergency-services audiences — is essentially my current workflow at UB, just pointed at a different sector. I'd love to bring my newsletter discipline (Research Matters runs at nearly 2x the higher-ed industry click rate) and journalism standards to a fully remote senior seat.

jobs.title: Copywriter, Politics
jobs.description_snippet: Top-tier progressive comms / PR agency. Copywriter on the politics practice — persuasive messaging, press materials and campaign copy. Some weekend availability expected.
match_reasons: Journalism + politics newsroom background = unique edge
jobs.cover_letter_opener: BerlinRosen's politics practice does what newsrooms used to do — write fast, choose words carefully and treat the audience like adults. As a former Junior Editor at The Daily Caller News Foundation who covered politics, business and foreign affairs on tight deadlines, I'd bring an unusual asset to the copywriter seat: I know what reporters do with my copy after I hand it over.

jobs.title: Project Coordinator, Marketing & Communications
jobs.description_snippet: Mission-driven scientific nonprofit seeking a marketing & communications project coordinator. Mirrors candidate's UB RIED role with institutional comms, social, newsletters.
match_reasons: Almost a one-to-one match for current job, but remote
jobs.cover_letter_opener: I currently coordinate marketing and communications for a research office at the University at Buffalo. The APS Project Coordinator role is, structurally, my exact job — same audiences, same channels — just remote and at a scientific society. I'd love the chance to keep doing the work I'm best at, from a different home base.

jobs.title: OCM Communications Specialist — Business Modernization
jobs.description_snippet: Embedded change-comms specialist for Moog's SAP ERP modernization. Translate complex technical updates into clear messaging via email, intranet, presentations and stakeholder briefings.
match_reasons: Maddie's reference Shawn Roche is at Moog
jobs.cover_letter_opener: Two of my references work at Moog, and I've watched from the UB side as the company keeps reinventing itself for the next decade. The OCM Communications Specialist role is a perfect translation problem: take a heavy SAP modernization and write it down for thousands of employees in language they actually use. That's the muscle I built as a reporter at The Daily Caller News Foundation and now use weekly at UB, turning federal-grant policy and clinical-trial science into copy a Provost can hand to a board.

jobs.title: Content Creator & Writer — Virtual Reali-Tea
jobs.description_snippet: Page Six seeks a sharp, reality-TV-obsessed content creator/writer for its Virtual Reali-Tea vertical — writing, editing and producing fast-paced pop-culture content.
match_reasons: Pop culture instinct explicitly named in Maddie's bio
jobs.cover_letter_opener: I'm a Riff contributor who writes about underground artists at midnight and former Junior Editor at a national newsroom by day — Virtual Reali-Tea is the rare seat where both halves of my brain get to show up at work. I write fast, I edit clean and I can read a room of reality-TV fans the same way I read a music thread.

jobs.title: Communications Writer
jobs.description_snippet: Global law firm hiring a communications writer to produce attorney spotlights, newsletters, thought leadership and editorial content for internal and external audiences.
match_reasons: Profile writing = same as RIED researcher spotlights
jobs.cover_letter_opener: Attorney spotlights, newsletters and thought-leadership pieces are essentially what I write every month at UB — only the subject matter expert is a Vice President or a Provost instead of a partner. The writing posture is the same: listen carefully, ask one more question than feels polite, and turn it into a story a non-expert wants to read.

jobs.title: Communications Manager — College of Professional Studies
jobs.description_snippet: Own the College of Professional Studies' voice across social, web, email and print. Lead creative direction, social strategy, website, SEO/SEM, newsletter content and workforce partner comms — with team management responsibility.
match_reasons: WordPress + Adobe + AP Style + newsletter all listed
jobs.cover_letter_opener: Syracuse's College of Professional Studies needs a single owner for the voice across social, web, email and print — which is, more or less, the job description for what I've done as a one-person shop at UB's RIED. The Research Matters newsletter I built now clicks at nearly double the national higher-ed average, and our LinkedIn has grown 226,500 percent since I took it over. I'd love to bring that playbook to CPS as I step into a manager seat.

jobs.title: Copywriter, Politics (LinkedIn)
jobs.description_snippet: Indeed mirror of the BerlinRosen Copywriter Politics role. Apply through either source; this listing is here so it stays on the radar if the LinkedIn post expires.
match_reasons: Mirror listing — apply once, track once
jobs.cover_letter_opener: (Use the BerlinRosen opener above — same role, different board.)

jobs.title: Brand Writer
jobs.description_snippet: Global HR/employer-of-record platform hiring a senior brand writer for creative campaigns and web copy across formats.
match_reasons: Brand writing + multi-format range = direct match
jobs.cover_letter_opener: Remote.com hires people who can write for an audience that lives in twelve time zones at once — that's a journalism job, even when the brand says marketing. I'd bring my newsroom training, my Substack and Riff bylines, and my UB-tested ability to translate complex topics into copy that crosses borders to your brand-writing team.

jobs.title: Marketing Proposal Coordinator — Strategic Growth Team
jobs.description_snippet: Lead proposal and qualification development for WSP's national Strategic Growth Team — write original content, coordinate kick-offs, produce RFP materials, and support newsletter/regional visibility comms.
jobs.cover_letter_opener: WSP's Strategic Growth Team is essentially a newsroom on deadline — and that's the environment where I do my best work. As a Junior Editor at The Daily Caller News Foundation I lived inside fast-turn pitches and tight headlines; now at UB I build proposals and grant narratives for researchers chasing federal funding. SharePoint, Adobe Suite and a calm hand on deadline are already in my daily routine.

jobs.title: Copywriter — Wellness Creative
jobs.description_snippet: Healthcare advertising agency seeking a copywriter for the Wellness creative team — conceptual copy across pharma/health accounts, partnered with art directors and account staff.
jobs.cover_letter_opener: Wellness copy is a deceptively hard craft — the science has to be right, the regulator has to be calm, and the human reading it still needs to feel something. That triangulation is the daily problem I solve at UB writing about FOXG1 clinical trials, AIforExceptionalEd and Merck-acquired biotech spin-outs. I'd love to bring that ear to the Wellness creative team at Saatchi.

jobs.title: Digital Editor
jobs.description_snippet: Collaborate with cross-departmental editors to ensure seamless coverage and story presentation. 3+ years as breaking news/homepage editor required.
match_reasons: Junior Editor → Digital Editor is a clean step up
Maddie already has homepage/breaking experience at DCNF
jobs.cover_letter_opener: I went from reporter to Junior Editor at The Daily Caller News Foundation in twelve months by living on the homepage during breaking news cycles — politics, business, foreign affairs — and assigning sharp leads under deadline. A Digital Editor seat at the New York Post would put me back in the chair I most enjoy, on a much bigger stage.

jobs.title: Editorial Manager
jobs.description_snippet: Fast-growing SaaS hiring an editorial manager to lead content strategy, editorial calendar and cross-channel publishing.
match_reasons: Editorial Manager = natural Junior Editor → Editor → Editorial Manager arc
jobs.cover_letter_opener: Editorial Manager is, on paper, the title that connects the dots in my career — Junior Editor at a national newsroom, Communications & Marketing Coordinator running a higher-ed editorial calendar, and now a remote SaaS editor's seat. I'd love to talk about how Typeform's calendar gets sharper.

jobs.title: Assistant Director of Visual Communications
jobs.description_snippet: Advancement Marketing and Communications team role supporting visual design across print, digital and web for the $1B Boldly Buffalo campaign. Adobe Creative Suite + UX foundations required. Application deadline June 1, 2026.
match_reasons: Internal UB move — same system, new division
jobs.cover_letter_opener: I've spent the last three years at UB's RIED office writing the research half of the Boldly Buffalo story — Empire AI, the Merck acquisition, $1M in UBLAUNCH grants. Advancement Communications is the donor-facing other half of that same story, and I'd welcome the chance to bring my journalism instincts, Adobe Suite fluency and UB institutional knowledge to the visual-comms side of the campaign before the June 1 deadline.

jobs.title: Writer, Office of the CEO
jobs.description_snippet: Dow Jones (WSJ / News Corp) seeks a writer to craft executive communications, speeches and editorial content for the CEO. Prestige role with strong editorial alignment.
match_reasons: Journalism alum at WSJ-parent = perfect cultural fit
Already writes for VPs/Provost at UB
jobs.cover_letter_opener: Writing in someone else's voice for an audience that won't grant you a second draft is a craft I picked up in the newsroom and have practiced every week at UB, where I write for Vice Presidents and our Provost. The Office of the CEO role at Dow Jones — a newsroom-adjacent shop where the standards are non-negotiable — is the kind of seat I'd love to interview for.

jobs.title: Marketing Copywriter
jobs.description_snippet: Brooklyn-based fast-growing athletic / lifestyle brand. Copywriter with sharp instinct for brand voice — read a brand's content and reproduce its tone with precision.
match_reasons: Running background literally on resume (Nazareth Track & XC)
jobs.cover_letter_opener: I ran NCAA Division III cross country and track at Nazareth — Bandit Running is the brand I wish had existed for me then, and the brand I want to write for now. Brand voice work, in my reading, is just journalism turned inward: notice the tone a brand already has, and stop missing it. I'd be glad to take a Bandit prompt and show you the proof.

jobs.title: Platforms Editor — Special Projects
jobs.description_snippet: USA TODAY (Gannett) hiring a Platforms Editor for special editorial projects — fits journalism, AP style and social publishing background.
match_reasons: AP Style + social publishing both on resume
jobs.cover_letter_opener: A Platforms Editor seat on USA TODAY's Special Projects desk would let me bring both halves of my career to the same screen — newsroom AP-style instincts from The Daily Caller News Foundation and a marketer's grasp of how stories travel on platforms today. I'd love a conversation.

jobs.title: Marketing Coordinator
jobs.description_snippet: EdTech for K-12 / higher-ed institutions (school CMS). Marketing coordinator role — direct fit for someone with higher-ed background, CMS skills, newsletter and PM tool experience.
match_reasons: Higher-ed customer base = direct lived expertise
jobs.cover_letter_opener: I am, very literally, Finalsite's user — I run institutional comms inside a major research university every day. Bringing that voice-of-customer fluency to the marketing-coordinator seat at Finalsite would mean every campaign you ship has someone on the inside who's already lived its pain.

jobs.title: Programmatic Communications Coordinator
jobs.description: Hybrid NYC role supporting TAG’s TB program communications: develop communications strategy, manage publications, write press/web/social copy, coordinate campaigns, webinars, and earned media.
match_reasons: Strong writing/editing + newsroom background aligns with producing publications and press/web/social copy.
Hybrid NYC target geography; nonprofit advocacy comms fits her public-interest writing focus.
WordPress/Adobe experience maps to CMS + visual content coordination requirements.
jobs.cover_letter_opener: I’m excited by TAG’s mission-driven communications work and the chance to translate complex TB policy and program work into clear, human-centered messaging. In my current communications and marketing role at the University at Buffalo and my prior newsroom reporting/editing work, I’ve built a habit of turning technical topics into publish-ready stories, releases, and social copy that move audiences to action.

jobs.title: Social Media Listening Analyst
jobs.description_snippet: 2–5 yrs in social media analytics, social listening, digital insights or customer intelligence at a major telecom. Sprinklr-adjacent stack.
match_reasons: Sprinklr is on Maddie's resume verbatim
Analyst pivot still uses comms skills
jobs.cover_letter_opener: Sprinklr is already part of my daily toolkit at UB, where I use it to read what's resonating across our research audiences and feed that back into the editorial calendar. The Social Media Listening Analyst role at Spectrum lets me do that work at a much larger scale — telecom audiences, multiple brands, real revenue stakes — and I'd love to be considered.

jobs.title: Copywriter
jobs.description_snippet: Global healthcare communications agency hiring a copywriter to develop creative copy for health and wellness brand accounts in New York.
jobs.cover_letter_opener: Ogilvy Health writes the science down for the humans who have to live with it — that is, in plain terms, my job at the University at Buffalo. Whether it's a $20M federal AI institute or a UB-led spin-out being acquired by Merck, the work is the same: find the line that makes a non-expert lean in.

jobs.title: Content Creator / Editor — NBC & Telemundo NY
jobs.description_snippet: Cross-platform content creator/editor producing digital content for NBC and Telemundo New York. Journalism, editorial and social media management skills needed.
jobs.cover_letter_opener: The 'duopoly' content creator/editor role at NBC & Telemundo NY is exactly the kind of hybrid newsroom seat I'm built for — half journalist, half social-media operator. At UB I grew RIED's LinkedIn 226,500% from inception while writing the press releases behind each post; I'd bring that same blended craft to NBCUniversal's NY duopoly.

jobs.title: Senior Copywriter — The Marketing Studio
jobs.description_snippet: Senior copywriter on Gallagher's in-house creative studio. Multi-channel copy across digital and print, partnering with Creative Director and brand team.
match_reasons: Wide salary range to land in
jobs.cover_letter_opener: Gallagher's Marketing Studio sounds like a real newsroom inside a Fortune 500 — multi-channel, deadline-driven, brand-disciplined. I write across that whole stack today at UB, from press releases to social to print collateral, and I'd love to bring that range to a remote senior seat.

jobs.title: Content Specialist (RFP / Design)
jobs.description_snippet: Write and coordinate RFP/RFQ responses, project narratives, team bios and marketing collateral. Maintain a centralized content library and enforce brand consistency across materials.
match_reasons: AP Style background fits brand-consistency role
jobs.cover_letter_opener: The Content Specialist role at Viaduct reads like a librarian-editor hybrid — and that's a lane I love. At RIED I serve as the primary copywriter for press releases, brochures, annual reports and email campaigns across multiple centers and institutes, holding the brand voice steady across all of them. I'd bring that same discipline to Viaduct's RFP library.

jobs.title: Copywriter II
jobs.description_snippet: Mid-level copywriter producing digital, social, email and product copy for Peloton's lifestyle brand. Hybrid in NYC.
match_reasons: Music-and-movement adjacency (Maddie writes for The Riff)
jobs.cover_letter_opener: Peloton's brand voice has always lived in the same emotional register I write in for The Riff on Medium — the moment when a song lands and you actually move. Bringing that ear to a Copywriter II seat at Peloton, where the copy has to land in 30 seconds on a phone, sounds like a great trade of skills.

jobs.title: Commerce Reporter
jobs.description_snippet: Reports, writes and refreshes commerce content with clean affiliate linking; collaborates with commerce editors, audience, SEO and partnerships teams.
match_reasons: NY Post is a clear journalism return
jobs.cover_letter_opener: A Commerce Reporter seat at the New York Post would let me return to the byline — but smarter than I left it. I now know what marketing looks like from the inside (Salesforce, Sprinklr, affiliate-style SEO copy), which means I can write commerce that earns clicks without losing the room.

jobs.title: Communications & Content Manager
jobs.description_snippet: Business consulting/advisory firm seeking a comms & content manager to handle internal and external communications, content production and editorial work across the org.
jobs.cover_letter_opener: Reading the NCM Communications & Content Manager description is like reading my current job description, lifted to a slightly different industry. Internal and external comms held together by one editor — that's the seat I'm in at UB today, and I'd be glad to bring it to your team.

jobs.title: Public Relations Assistant Account Executive
jobs.description_snippet: Support account teams with media monitoring, client/competitor research, press releases, briefing docs, social scheduling and editorial calendars. Cision, MuckRack, Meltwater stack.
jobs.cover_letter_opener: An Inkhouse AAE role would let me run the media-monitoring, editorial-calendar and briefing-doc work I genuinely love, inside a PR shop that takes its sources seriously. As a former Junior Editor at The Daily Caller News Foundation, reading the news and spotting what matters is muscle memory — and I'd be glad to confirm whether Buffalo-based hybrid fits your team's plans for this seat.

jobs.title: Influencer Performance & Content Coordinator
jobs.description_snippet: Prestige haircare brand. Coordinate influencer campaigns across TikTok/Instagram/YouTube, creator pipelines and performance reporting.
jobs.cover_letter_opener: I'm a Coordinator who runs the actual numbers behind growth — at UB I averaged ~94 new LinkedIn followers per month with a strict editorial calendar, not luck. OLAPLEX's Influencer Performance & Content Coordinator seat is the same shape of job at consumer scale, and I'd love to bring that same discipline to your creator pipeline.

jobs.title: Copywriter
jobs.description_snippet: Social-first global creative agency hiring a copywriter for compelling social content and brand campaigns for major clients.
match_reasons: Social-first matches Maddie's biggest demonstrated skill
jobs.cover_letter_opener: Most copywriters can write a headline; fewer know what happens to it once it hits a feed. I do — I've grown a research office's LinkedIn audience 226,500 percent from inception by writing for the algorithm without writing down to it. I'd bring that ear to We Are Social.

jobs.title: Marketing Specialist
jobs.description_snippet: Healthcare/academic marketing specialist — 2+ years digital marketing and social media management; some travel within the medical group.
jobs.cover_letter_opener: UBMD Emergency Medicine sits at the intersection of two worlds I already work between every day — academic medicine and patient-facing marketing. My RIED communications work routinely involves UB physician-scientists and clinical trials; building marketing specifically for the ER side of that ecosystem would be a natural next chapter.

jobs.title: Editor, Ten Speed Press
jobs.description_snippet: Editor at Ten Speed Press (cookbook/lifestyle imprint of Penguin Random House). Works with design, production and marketing on the imprint's titles. NYC or CA hybrid.
match_reasons: Editorial craft + project management both on resume
jobs.cover_letter_opener: I've been an editor on tight deadlines in a newsroom and an editor on long arcs at UB; the Ten Speed Press seat is the kind of editorial work where both rhythms meet. I'd love to bring my project-management instincts (Basecamp/Asana/Monday daily) and my obvious affection for lifestyle and music writing to an imprint that already publishes the books I read.

jobs.title: Marketing Content Manager
jobs.description_snippet: Mission-driven dental / health-insurance nonprofit seeking a marketing content manager — content strategy, copywriting and digital marketing.
jobs.cover_letter_opener: Mission-driven healthcare comms is a lane I know well from UB's medical and research-tech work. Delta Dental of MA's Marketing Content Manager role is an ideal blend — mission, healthcare, content strategy, remote — and I'd love to be part of it.

jobs.title: Social Media & Content Specialist
jobs.description_snippet: Writes testimonial stories and supports SEO-driven content strategy with social media focus — university communications environment.
jobs.cover_letter_opener: Higher-ed storytelling that actually earns the click is a craft I've been refining at UB. Ball State's Social Media & Content Specialist role lets me keep doing that work, from anywhere — and bring a Buffalo-trained eye for the kind of story your testimonial pipeline needs.

jobs.title: Marketing & Digital Content Specialist
jobs.description_snippet: Drafts marketing materials (social posts, website content, email campaigns) and manages social media platforms and basic marketing tools for a Buffalo law firm.
match_reasons: Legal copy listed on Maddie's resume
jobs.cover_letter_opener: A law-firm marketing seat is a natural fit for me — 'compliance and legal copy' is already a line on my resume from running RIED's regulatory communications, and as a former newsroom editor I'm fluent in turning legal documents into clear language for general readers. I'd bring WordPress, Adobe Suite and a journalist's nose for accuracy to Hiller Comerford.

jobs.title: Sr. Content Marketing & Communications Manager
jobs.description_snippet: B2B cybersecurity software firm hiring a senior content marketing and communications manager — content strategy, copywriting, PR messaging and digital marketing.
match_reasons: Wide content + comms scope matches Maddie's range
jobs.cover_letter_opener: Tufin's Sr. Content Marketing & Communications Manager seat asks for one person who can hold strategy, copy, PR and digital together. That's the seat I sit in at UB, just at a research-institution scale; I'd be excited to bring that range to a remote SaaS company.

jobs.title: Group Copy Supervisor
jobs.description_snippet: Develops original content across deliverables (brochures, emails, social media, banners, videos, websites) at a healthcare marketing agency. Supervisory copy seat.
match_reasons: Healthcare + multi-format = same lane as ImageTrend / Saatchi Health
jobs.cover_letter_opener: A Group Copy Supervisor seat at Synchrony lets me grow into the editor role I've quietly been preparing for — multi-format healthcare copy and the responsibility of holding a team's voice steady. I'd bring my Junior Editor instincts and my UB multi-channel range to your group.

jobs.title: Marketing and Communications Assistant
jobs.description_snippet: Prepares regular communications reports including media coverage, social engagement and success metrics; plans and executes media events for this historic parks nonprofit.
match_reasons: Event coordination experience (UB United Way campaign)
jobs.cover_letter_opener: Olmsted's parks are, in a real sense, Buffalo's first public-facing brand. The Marketing and Communications Assistant role would let me bring the event-coordination muscle I built leading RIED's United Way campaign — which raised 98% of our fundraising goal in its first year — to the Conservancy's media-event work, and write the reports that show the city what its parks are doing.

jobs.title: Communications & Marketing Specialist I (Fondren Library)
jobs.description_snippet: Rice's Fondren Library hires a comms & marketing specialist for newsletters, social, email marketing, annual reports, events and digital content. Hybrid arrangement.
match_reasons: Hybrid (mostly remote) Houston — would require relocation
jobs.cover_letter_opener: Rice's Fondren Library role is a beautiful skills match — newsletter writing, Adobe Suite, AP Style, social and event support — and I'd love to talk through whether the hybrid arrangement can accommodate a Buffalo-based candidate, or whether a Houston relocation is on the table.

jobs.title: Marketing Operations Manager
jobs.description_snippet: Coordinates social media creative and print assets with the bank's ad agency based on campaign direction. Marketing ops leadership role.
jobs.cover_letter_opener: Five Star's Marketing Operations Manager seat is the kind of role I'm ready to grow into. I already sit between an internal team and outside vendors at UB, holding campaigns together across print, digital and event lanes for the Realizing AI for Good initiative and several other research-led brands. Bringing that operating discipline to a Buffalo-headquartered bank is a clean step up.

jobs.title: Public Relations Manager
jobs.description_snippet: Lead external comms for global aerospace manufacturer — build media relationships, draft press releases, develop PR strategy and run rapid-response comms. Cross-functional stakeholder management.
jobs.cover_letter_opener: I'm putting myself forward as a stretch candidate for the PR Manager role because the job description is the job I've been quietly building toward. Today at UB I draft the press releases, manage the rapid-response cycle when federal policy shifts overnight, and own the media relationships our Vice Presidents lean on. With two Moog references already in my corner and a Ragan PR certificate finished last summer, I'd love a conversation.
